cards.title: AI Agent Side Hustle Dashboard
cards.description: Notion template + live tracking for AI agent income. Build once, sell forever on Gumroad.

cards.title: Demand Lab — Public Signal Feed
cards.description: Live display of developer pain points scraped from Twitter/Reddit/GitHub. Landing page + lead gen.
cards.source: Twitter — top signal category: AI agents (11 signals)
cards.notes: Live signal feed at /demand-radar. Demand Lab pipeline at /demand-lab.

cards.title: Demand Lab — Ops Dashboard
cards.description: Internal version with demand cards, prioritization queue, and auto-demo integration.
cards.notes: Cards system + pipeline flow live at /demand-lab.

cards.title: AI Agent Engineer Playbook
cards.description: Comprehensive playbook: tools stack, income strategies, workflow templates. $19-99 on Gumroad.
cards.source: Twitter signal — 'learn to build claude skills' thread
cards.notes: Needs: real case studies, income screenshots. Do NOT fake numbers.

cards.title: Algora Bounty Hunter Toolkit
cards.description: Script that auto-scans Algora for $100+ bounties with <5 claims, filters by language, and submits PR.
cards.notes: Scanner works but Reddit/GitHub sources broken. Fix ws module first.

cards.title: Claude Code Job Search System
cards.description: AI agent that applies to jobs via Claude Code.有人在做，我们能做吗？差异化：专注 remote contractor roles。
cards.notes: High effort, uncertain demand. Monitor signal first before building.

cards.title: Twitter Signal → Content Pipeline
cards.description: Auto-capture high-engagement AI agent tweets → generate reply threads → auto-post via X API.
cards.source: Twitter — @AlexFinn 697 likes on Claude Opus 4.7 thread
cards.notes: X API free tier: read-only. Posting needs elevated access. Check cost.

cards.title: AI Audit Tool — Free Lead Gen
cards.description: Free tool: paste your workflow → get AI agent recommendations. Gathers emails for paid product upsell.
cards.source: Twitter — @TrueMarkUSA free AI audit tool launch
cards.notes: Lead gen play. Free tool → email capture → Gumroad product.
